description: End-to-end CI takes ~45 minutes per commit causing long feedback loops and context switching; parallelism is limited and caching is misconfigured.
Authentication microservice is still on a deprecated framework version with security patches ending this quarter; impacts login and session stability.
Schema changes are applied via ad-hoc manual SQL; no standardized migration tooling or rollback process.

column3: forcing 2-3 reruns per PR and masking real regressions.

description: Services emit logs with inconsistent structure and correlation IDs
column3: making incident triage and tracing slow.

description: Mobile apps use a 2-major-versions-old feature flag SDK that adds ~80ms to startup and lacks fail-closed behavior.
Payment retries do not use idempotency keys or exponential backoff
column3: risking duplicate charges and noisy failures.

description: No circuit breaker or graceful degradation around the third-party tax calculation API; outages cascade to checkout.
Order and line-item fetching in checkout path triggers N+1 queries

column4: auth) are stale or missing escalation paths; slows incident response.
